passiveAbilities.name: Dagger
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Flea Infested Pelt
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce Magical and Slicing Dmg suffered by -1.

passiveAbilities.name: Honour Amongst Thieves
passiveAbilities.description: Friendly Rogues within 6" gain +1 Arcane Stat.

activeAbilities.name: Sneaking
activeAbilities.description: This character gets -2 Evade Stat until end of turn.

activeAbilities.name: Squeaking
activeAbilities.description: Move target enemy 1". Reaction Steps cannot be declared in response to this action.

activeAbilities.name: Robbery
activeAbilities.description: Target model with less Wds remaining than this character, loses possession of one Moonstone and this character gains possession of that Moonstone.

activeAbilities.name: Sewer Rat
activeAbilities.description: You may only play this ability if Muridae is inside a building. This character is Removed From Play. At the start of the next Replenish Step, return this character to play inside any building.

signatureMove.name: Hamstring
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee, they gain Slow and cannot take Step Actions or Reaction Steps until end of turn.
